zh.lifeSummary: 當SIR JOHN MIDDLETON於1380年出生在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德米德萊頓時，他的父親Sir Nicholas MIDDELTON34歲，母親Aviste or Alice Stapleton33歲。他於1399年與Lady Alice Mauleverer在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1478年在英國英格蘭肯特享年98歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当SIR JOHN MIDDLETON于1380年出生在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德米德萊頓时，他的父亲Sir Nicholas MIDDELTON34岁，母亲Aviste or Alice Stapleton33岁。他于1399年与Lady Alice Mauleverer在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1478年在英国英格兰肯特享年98岁。

nameMeanings.name: MIDDLETON
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so called. In over thirty instances from many different areas, the name is from Old English midel ‘middle’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’. However, Middleton on the Hill near Leominster in Herefordshire appears in Domesday Book as Miceltune, the first element clearly being Old English micel ‘large’, ‘great’ (see Middlebrook ). Middleton Baggot and Middleton Priors in Shropshire have early spellings that suggest gem̄thhyll (from gem̄th ‘confluence’ + hyll ‘hill’) + tūn as the origin. This surname is also found in Scotland and Ireland.

History: A Scottish family of this name derives it from lands at Middleto(u)n near Kincardine. The Scottish physician Peter Middleton practiced in New York City after 1752 and was one of the founders of the medical school at King's College (now Columbia University) in 1767. One of the earliest of the Charleston, SC, Middleton family of prominent legislators was Arthur Middleton, born in Charleston in 1681. The name has also been established in Ireland since at least the 13th century; its presence was reinforced by settlers in the 17th century.

variants.name: Midthun
meanings: Norwegian: habitational name from any of about ten farmsteads in western Norway named Midtun, from Old Norse mith ‘middle’ + tún ‘enclosure, farmstead’. Compare Middleton .

variants.name: Melton
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from any of various places, for example in Leicestershire, Lincolnshire, Norfolk, and Yorkshire, all of which have the same origin as Middleton , with Old English middel replaced by its Old Norse equivalent methal after the Scandinavian settlement of northern and eastern England.

variants.name: Middlebrook
meanings: English: habitational name from a lost Micklebrook in Blackburn (Lancashire), recorded as Mikelbroc in the 13th century. The placename appears to derive from Old English micel ‘big’ + brōc ‘brook, stream’. The surname has undergone a dissimilatory or folk-etymological change from Mickle- to Middle-.

variants.name: Milton
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name from one or other of the many places called Milton, or sometimes Middleton (see Middleton ) and occasionally Melton (see Melton ), most of which derive from Old English middel ‘middle’ or myln ‘mill’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’.

nameMeanings.name: JOHN
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When SIR JOHN MIDDLETON was born in 1380, in Middleton, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Nicholas MIDDELTON, was 34 and his mother, Aviste or Alice Stapleton, was 33. He married Lady Alice Mauleverer in 1399, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1478, in Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 98.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque SIR JOHN MIDDLETON est né en 1380, à Middleton, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Nicholas MIDDELTON, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Aviste or Alice Stapleton, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Lady Alice Mauleverer en 1399, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1478, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 98 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als SIR JOHN MIDDLETON 1380 in Middleton, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Nicholas MIDDELTON 34 und seine Mutter Aviste or Alice Stapleton 33. Er hat 1399 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Lady Alice Mauleverer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1478 im Alter von 98 Jahren in Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando SIR JOHN MIDDLETON è nato il nel 1380 nel Middleton, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Nicholas MIDDELTON, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Aviste or Alice Stapleton, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Lady Alice Mauleverer nel 1399, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1478, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 98 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: SIR JOHN MIDDLETONが1380年にイギリスイギリスウエストモーランドミッドレトンで生まれた時，父Sir Nicholas MIDDELTONは34歳，母Aviste or Alice Stapletonは33歳であった。1399年にイギリスイギリスデボンでLady Alice Maulevererと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1478年にイギリスイギリスケントで98歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: SIR JOHN MIDDLETON(이)가 1380년 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 미들레턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Nicholas MIDDELTON(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Aviste or Alice Stapleton(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1399년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Lady Alice Mauleverer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1478년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 98세의 나이로 사망했다.

Ele casou-se com Lady Alice Mauleverer em 1399, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 6 filhas. ru.lifeSummary: Когда SIR JOHN MIDDLETON родился в 1380 г. в местности миддлетон, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Nicholas MIDDELTON было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Aviste or Alice Stapleton, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Alice Mauleverer в 1399 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1478 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 98 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando SIR JOHN MIDDLETON nació en 1380, en Middleton, Westmorland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Nicholas MIDDELTON, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Aviste or Alice Stapleton, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Lady Alice Mauleverer en 1399, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1478, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 98 años.
